description_long: This is a yellow New York City taxi sedan with a prominent roof-mounted sign advertising 'The Cat King.' The vehicle features blacked-out windows, standard four-door configuration, and realistic details such as side mirrors, door handles, and alloy wheels. The taxi displays NYC Taxi branding and decals, including a medallion number and fare information on the side doors. The rear of the car includes red tail lights, a visible license plate, and dual exhaust pipes. The front showcases a detailed grille, headlights, and a license plate. The overall finish is glossy, with a smooth, hard exterior typical of modern urban taxis.
description: A yellow NYC taxi sedan with a roof sign, blacked-out windows, and detailed branding decals. Features include alloy wheels, visible license plates, and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing red tail lights, license plate, dual exhausts, and the roof sign.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the NYC Taxi branding, fare decals, and the roof sign advertisement.
description_view_2: Front three-quarter view displaying the grille, headlights, front license plate, and roof sign.
description_view_3: Right side view with clear visibility of the NYC Taxi branding, decals, and roof sign.
